# isAdhocSigned

**Type Property**

The code is adhoc signed i.e. it contains a code directory and page hashes but no CMS signature.

## Declaration

```swift
static let isAdhocSigned: OnDiskCodeSigningFlags.ValueSet
```

## Discussion

This is equivalent to `CS_ADHOC` in C APIs.
title: isAdhocSigned
